note: Bootstrap Styles is a Layout Builder styling foundation: two plugin types (Style + StylesGroup) with two managers, a StylesGroupManager form/render service, one config object of option classes, and a settings route. It ships no UI on Layout Builder itself — bootstrap_layout_builder consumes it. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: In Bootstrap Styles for Drupal, what are the two plugin types it defines and which plugin manager service instantiates each?
evals.expected_output: Style plugins (@Style, manager plugin.manager.bootstrap_styles / StyleManager) and StylesGroup plugins (@StylesGroup, manager plugin.manager.bootstrap_styles_group / StylesGroupManager).

evals.prompt: I want to add a custom style control to Bootstrap Styles. What annotation and base class do I use, in which plugin namespace, and how do I bind it to a group?
evals.expected_output: Create a plugin under Plugin/BootstrapStyles/Style extending StylePluginBase with an @Style annotation; set group_id to the StylesGroup it belongs to.

evals.prompt: Which built-in style groups does Bootstrap Styles provide for Layout Builder (e.g. for backgrounds, spacing, borders, shadow, typography, animations)?
evals.expected_output: Built-in StylesGroup plugins: background, spacing, border, shadow, typography, animation.

evals.prompt: Programmatically, how does Bootstrap Styles expose its style controls on a Layout Builder section/block form and then render the chosen CSS classes onto the element? Name the service and the methods.
evals.expected_output: Via the StylesGroupManager service (plugin.manager.bootstrap_styles_group): buildStylesFormElements() adds the controls, submitStylesFormElements() collects values, buildStyles() attaches the CSS classes to the element build.

evals.prompt: Where do I configure Bootstrap Styles option classes and settings, and which permission gates it? Give the route name and path.
evals.expected_output: Route bootstrap_styles.settings at /admin/config/bootstrap-styles/settings, gated by the 'configure bootstrap styles' permission; edits the bootstrap_styles.settings config object.

evals.prompt: In Bootstrap Styles, how are the selectable style options (e.g. background colors, padding) defined in configuration? What is the line format and where is it stored?
evals.expected_output: As one `key|label` per line (key = CSS class without the dot, e.g. bs-bg-success|Green) in the bootstrap_styles.settings config object; parsed by getStyleOptions().

evals.prompt: How can another module alter or remove Bootstrap Styles' Style/StylesGroup plugin definitions?
evals.expected_output: Both managers call alterInfo('bootstrap_styles_info'), so implement hook_bootstrap_styles_info_alter(&$definitions) to add/remove/modify plugin definitions.

evals.prompt: Does Bootstrap Styles add the styling UI to Layout Builder by itself, and which popular module builds on it to provide the section/block styling experience?
evals.expected_output: No — Bootstrap Styles is a foundation providing the style plugins/engine; bootstrap_layout_builder consumes StylesGroupManager to expose the styling on Layout Builder sections and blocks.
